_comment: Copy this file, fill in the fields, and run: npm run has:append -- <your-file.json>
_comment2: Delete all _comment keys before running — they are for documentation only.
originating_question: Describe the question or task that led to this decision.
accepted_proposal: Describe what was decided or what was done. Use markdown freely.
operator_rationale: Optional. Why was this source/proposal accepted?
